name: Freshworks
overview_text: Freshworks is a leading customer engagement platform that provides businesses with a suite of products to manage their customers, employees, and businesses. Freshworks is focused on making business software easy and affordable for small to midsized businesses (SMBs) so they can grow faster.
history_timeline: ['2010 - Founded by Girish Mathrubootham and Shanu Narayanan', '2014 - Released Freshdesk', '2016 - Raised $50 million in Series E funding', '2017 - Launched Freshsales', '2018 - Launched Freshservice', '2019 - Raised $100 million in Series F funding']

core_value_proposition: Simplify business software for small to midsized businesses.
key_challenges_needs: Scaling operations to meet growing demand
strategic_priorities: Scaling operations, expanding product offerings, strengthening partnerships
work_culture_summary: Freshworks has a strong focus on employee experience, culture, and well-being.

description: Freshworks is a leading customer engagement platform that provides businesses with a suite of products to manage their customers, employees, and businesses. Freshworks is focused on making business software easy and affordable for small to midsized businesses (SMBs) so they can grow faster.
vision_statement: Empower businesses to thrive in a rapidly changing world by delivering innovative, customer-centric solutions.
mission_statement: To make businesses great to do business with.
sales_motion: Freshworks offers a suite of cloud-based business software solutions, including CRM, sales, marketing, and customer support tools.
